title: Thoughts on 1/30/23 — egg shells, Pink Floyd, week four
html:
Late-night journal — Yahir circles two threads: the lingering knowledge that he's "a good person capable of doing bad things" (referencing the moment he spit in his dad's face) and the pink floyd time anxiety that week 4 of term has produced nothing — no women, no friends, no business.

TL;DR

  • First explicit "spit in dad's face" reference in the 2023 corpus — extends the yahir dad addiction arc into a new register: not victim, but capable-of-becoming-the-villain.
  • Frames self-management as addiction-management: "like an addict who needs to focus on not relapsing, except I have never relapsed."
  • Cites Pink Floyd's "Time" — fear of missing the starting gun. Commits to going to the craft center, smiling more, dialing in ambitions.
  • "You may be a fraud in many departments, but never let your foot off the gas pedal" — fraud-feeling motif recurs in 2023 03 01 Thoughts and Things on 22823.

yahir dad addiction arc · pink floyd time · journal practice · craft center · fraud feeling · osig
